# Migration 11 schema diff — forward → reverse round-trip
# Generated by Phase C Task 3.8 (test_migration_11_schema_diff_is_empty).
# Compares sqlite_master.sql output between (a) a freshly-built v10 DB
# and (b) a v10 DB that has been forward-migrated to 11 then
# reverse-migrated back to 10. Empty diff body means the round-trip
# is byte-identical (modulo SQLite-internal table-name double-quoting
# from ALTER TABLE RENAME, which is normalised before comparison).
#
# A non-empty diff here would indicate a logical schema drift in the
# reverse migration that must be fixed before merging Phase C.

(empty diff — round-trip is lossless)
